meaning: n.兴奋剂,兴奋性饮料adj.热忱的,诚恳的,兴奋的
examples: I wish to take this opportunity to extend to you cordial greetings and best wishes of the Chinese Government and people!
He had never known him to be so chatty and cordial.
One taught me reading, the other taught me composition, both of whom were cordial and strict.
Try one of the bar's signature creations, Beefeater Gin sweetened with homemade jam or fresh-mixed lime cordial.
Tears gleamed in his eyes when he recalled the cordial relations he once enjoyed with Britain's Royal Family.
